name: Broccoli Rice Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 can (10 3/4 oz.) condensed mushroom soup, undiluted
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet over medium heat, sauté onion, celery, and broccoli in butter for 3-5 minutes.
2. Stir in cheese, soup, and milk until smooth.
3. Place rice in a greased 8-inch square baking dish.
4. Pour cheese mixture over; do not stir.
5. Bake, uncovered, at 325°F for 25-30 minutes or until hot and bubbly.
